weather.heroTitle: Marine weather, shoreline wind, and daily coastal conditions.
weather.heroDescription: Regional forecasts for ports, beaches, marinas, and shoreline travel around the Black Sea.
weather.noStationMatchBody: Refine the city name or search by country.

errors.invalidResponse: Forecast feed returned an invalid response.
errors.loadFailed: Weather data could not be loaded.

weather.hourlyEmpty: Hourly sea-state data will appear here.
weather.regionalNoteBody: Use wind, wave, and rain shifts together. Calm morning water can still deteriorate quickly once afternoon gust bands move inland.
weather.dataSource: Data source: Open-Meteo forecast and marine feeds for the selected coastal station.

description.trusted: The stored fingerprint matches this peer. Re-verify if the contact setup changed.
description.changed: The stored fingerprint does not match this peer. Treat the session as untrusted until you verify and update it.
description.waiting: The call is still negotiating. The peer code will appear once offer or answer exchange completes.
description.unverified: Compare your short code with the peer short code on the other device, then mark it as verified.
